PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Uvicorn processes ==="; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe' OR Name='uvicorn.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'uvicorn' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List; Write-Output "=== Port 8080 listener ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table; Write-Output "=== Python procs on backend venv ==="; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Parent of uvicorn PIDs ==="; @\(27260,12860,21056\) | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$_" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { $parent = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($p.ParentProcessId\)" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ PID=$p.ProcessId; PPID=$p.ParentProcessId; ParentName=$parent.Name; ParentCmd=$parent.CommandLine } } } | Format-List; Write-Output "=== Scheduled tasks mentioning uvicorn ==="; Get-ScheduledTask -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Actions.Execute -match 'uvicorn|main:app' -or $_.Actions.Arguments -match 'uvicorn|main:app' } | Select-Object TaskName, State, @{n='Cmd';e={$_.Actions.Execute + ' ' + $_.Actions.Arguments}})

PowerShell($log = Get-Content 'backend\\logs\\app.log'; $matches = $log | Select-String -Pattern "'float' object cannot be interpreted as an integer"; foreach \($m in $matches\) { $i = $m.LineNumber - 1; $end = [Math]::Min\($i + 90, $log.Count - 1\); Write-Output \("=== Match at line " + $m.LineNumber + " ==="\); for \($k = $i; $k -le $end; $k++\) { Write-Output $log[$k] } })

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const src=fs.readFileSync\('src/pages/HoldDashboardPage.jsx','utf8'\);let depth=0,line=1;for\(const c of src\){if\(c==='{'\)depth++;if\(c==='}'\)depth--;if\(c==='\\n'\)line++;if\(depth<0\){console.log\('NEG at line',line\);break;}}console.log\('Final brace depth:',depth,'lines:',line\);")

PowerShell($py = "d:\\projects\\ars_prod\\backend\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; & $py -c "from app.database.session import engine; from sqlalchemy import text;`nimport sys;`nwith engine.connect\(\) as c:`n    rows = c.execute\(text\(`"SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='ARS_GRID_MJ_GEN_ART' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION`"\)\).fetchall\(\)`n    for r in rows: print\(r[0]\)")

PowerShell("=== LISTENING SERVERS ==="; & netstat -ano | findstr "LISTENING" | findstr "127.0.0.1\\|0.0.0.0" | Sort-Object | ForEach-Object { $line = $_ -split '\\s+' | Where-Object { $_ }; $port = \($line[1] -split ':'\)[-1]; $procPid = $line[-1]; $proc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$procPid" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { "Port $port | PID $procPid | $\($proc.Name\) | $\(if \($proc.CommandLine\) { $proc.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(120, $proc.CommandLine.Length\)\) }\)" } } | Sort-Object -Unique)

PowerShell($results = @\(\); $lines = & netstat -ano | Select-String "LISTENING"; foreach \($line in $lines\) { $parts = \($line.ToString\(\) -split '\\s+'\) | Where-Object { $_ }; $local = $parts[1]; $procPid = $parts[-1]; $port = \($local -split ':'\)[-1]; if \($port -match '^\\d+$' -and [int]$port -lt 50000 -and [int]$port -gt 1024\) { $proc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$procPid" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $name = if \($proc\) { $proc.Name } else { '?' }; $results += "$local | PID $procPid | $name" } }; $results | Sort-Object -Unique)

PowerShell("=== ARS-RELATED PROCESSES ==="; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'uvicorn|main:app|vite|ars_prod' -or \($_.Name -match 'python|node' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'ars'\) } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, @{N='Cmd';E={if \($_.CommandLine\) { $_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(140,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\) }}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe' OR Name='node.exe' OR Name='uvicorn.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, @{n='Memory_MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSetSize/1MB,0\)}}, CreationDate, CommandLine | Sort-Object Name, ProcessId | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8000,8001,8080,5173,5174,3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{n='ProcessName';e={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
